summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRM Omnichannel module (Lead Pipeline Kanban + Omnichannel Interactions). Backend: 18/19 tests passed (94.7%). Frontend: All tests passed. Both features fully functional with proper UI/UX, data flow, and integration.

minor_issues.issue: Validation error returns 422 instead of 400 when name field is missing
minor_issues.impact: None - 422 is standard FastAPI/Pydantic validation error status code
minor_issues.note: This is expected behavior for FastAPI/Pydantic validation errors, not a bug

passed_tests: Backend: Login authentication
Backend: Create lead with valid data (default stage 'new')
Backend: Get leads list with entity scoping
Backend: Get leads board (Kanban) - all 5 stages with count & total_value
Backend: Get pipeline stats (by_stage, win_rate, open_count/value, won_value)
Backend: Update lead stage (stage_changed_at updated)
Backend: Invalid stage validation (returns 400)
Backend: Convert lead to customer (creates customer, sets lead.customer_id, stage='won')
Backend: Prevent duplicate conversion (returns 400)
Backend: Delete lead
Backend: Create interaction with valid data
Backend: Interaction validation (missing subject & notes returns 400)
Backend: Get interactions list
Backend: Filter interactions by channel
Backend: Delete interaction
Backend: Regression - customers endpoint works
Backend: Regression - sales-users endpoint works
Frontend: Login and navigation to CRM module
Frontend: Leads tab loads with Kanban board
Frontend: All 4 KPIs present (Lead Aktif, Nilai Pipeline Aktif, Win Rate, Nilai Menang)
Frontend: All 5 stage columns present (Baru, Kualifikasi, Penawaran, Menang, Kalah)
Frontend: Add Lead modal opens, form fills, and saves successfully
Frontend: Lead cards display with name, company, value, source, stage dropdown, edit/delete/convert buttons
Frontend: Interactions tab loads with timeline feed
Frontend: Interaction filters present (customer & channel)
Frontend: Add Interaction modal opens, form fills, and saves successfully
Frontend: Interaction feed displays with channel badges, direction, timestamps
Frontend: Regression - Pelanggan tab works
Frontend: Regression - Penagihan tab works
Frontend: Regression - Sales Force tab works
